name: fit4110-lab04-access-gate-docker
description: FIT4110 Lab 04 - Docker packaging and Newman verification for Access Gate service

scripts.test:local: npx newman run postman/collections/team-gate.postman_collection.json -e postman/environments/team-gate_local.postman_environment.json -r cli,junit,htmlextra --reporter-junit-export reports/newman-lab04-local.xml --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-lab04-local.html
